setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering constructor initialization and method invocation
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding meaningful logic to Test1() method to improve testability
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and lacks specific business logic

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add configuration options for timeout and retry mechanisms
fileReports.note: Tests simulate Kafka producer behavior but do not connect to actual Kafka broker. Integration tests would require a running Kafka instance.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, error handling, and disposal scenarios.
recommendations: Consider adding more granular error logging in readMessage method
Implement a more robust cancellation strategy for message consumption
Add optional timeout configuration for message reading
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer and FluentAssertions for assertions

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, constructors, and enum values with 100% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for order quantities
Add XML documentation comments to clarify model constraints
fileReports.note: Tests cover all existing model properties and enum values

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, serialization, and error scenarios
recommendations: Add more robust input validation in the controller
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more detailed error handling for ProducerWrapper
keyImprovements: Added test for valid order request
fileReports.note: Tests assume basic OrderRequest model with CustomerId, ProductId, and Quantity properties
